promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next bounded reduction on the graph prompt parent, but narrowed to a complementary slice rather than duplicating the already-existing authority contradiction packet.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates a compact ontology, explicit state markers, projection-vs-truth fences, reconstructability pressure, and user-agency/finality guards clearly enough for a second engine-pattern reduction.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The existing graph-runtime-authority sibling was used to avoid duplicating the authority slice, while the bootpack Thread A and Thread B reductions were used as the nearest comparators for shell behavior, artifact grammar, and trace/replay structure.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Not recreated because that authority-first graph-prompt contradiction packet already exists later in the intake surface and is used here only as a comparison anchor.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The graph-prompt parent batch plus the existing graph-runtime-authority sibling and nearby bootpack engine reductions were sufficient to isolate the complementary ontology and reconstructability slice for this pass.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the complementary reusable slice in the parent batch: ontology, projection fences, reconstructability, bounded interaction pacing, and agency/finality guards.
They preserve the graph prompt as a proposal-side interface shell without duplicating the already-existing authority contradiction packet.
They remain small, contradiction-preserving, and source-linked for later interface and traceability comparisons.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain grammar overreads, protocol overreads, implementation overreads, or user-agency overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
